_readme: LLM 评分回归用例：每条是「样例项目 + 期望分数区间」。每周评分后可抽查：把这些样例混入评分，检查结果是否落在期望区间。新发现的评分偏差请在此积累新用例。

project.name: ai-pet-rock
project.description: A rock with a camera and speaker that watches your life and comments on it sarcastically using a local LLM. No practical purpose whatsoever.

cases.why: 极端脑洞、无实用价值：whimsy/fun 应高，money 应低

project.name: yet-another-ai-crm
project.description: AI-powered CRM that summarizes customer emails using the OpenAI API. Standard SaaS pricing tiers.

cases.why: 常见套路 GPT 套壳 SaaS：whimsy 应低，money 中上

project.name: Scaling Laws for Sparse Mixture-of-Experts at Trillion Parameters
project.description: We derive empirical scaling laws for sparse MoE models up to 1T parameters, showing compute-optimal routing sparsity.

cases.why: 扎实研究但对普通人不好玩：fun 应低，money 论文类偏低

project.name: EchoTwin — clone your voice for meetings
project.description: Clone your voice in 30 seconds, let your AI twin attend boring meetings and answer simple questions for you. $12/mo.

cases.why: 新奇+好玩+明确订阅变现：三维都应中高
